description: Converts meeting transcripts, meeting minutes, and optional existing working paper drafts into structured working-paper artifacts. Handles transcript parsing, meeting delta computation, argument extraction, open question identification, section readiness scoring, patch generation, and draft assembly.
forbidden_responsibilities: Defining artifact models or envelope schemas — those are owned by shared.artifact_models
Defining identifier schemes — those are owned by shared.ids
Comment resolution logic — that belongs to workflow_modules.comment_resolution
Lifecycle enforcement and governance — that belongs to the control_plane
Storing or querying domain regulatory or allocation data — that belongs to domain_modules
Producing meeting minutes from raw transcripts — that belongs to workflow_modules.meeting_intelligence
